Initializes the touch sensor in the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This C header file declares a function [`touch_sensor_init`](<#touch_sensor_init>). The function is intended to initialize a touch sensor. The `#pragma once` directive is used to ensure the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
